Overrides.Override: Leech Energy Shield instead of Life Maximum total Energy Shield Recovery per second from Leech is doubled Cannot Recharge Energy Shield Limited to 1 Keystone Tattoo
2% increased Recovery Rate of Life, Mana and Energy Shield per Tribe for which you have an allocated Tattoo Limited to 1 Ancestral Tattoo
Tinctures applied to you have 30% increased Effect while affected by no Flasks Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Imbued
+1 to Level of all Dexterity Skill Gems Limited to 1 Attribute Notable Tattoo
20% chance for Skills to not consume a Cooldown on use Limited to 1 Runegraft of Time
